content.speakerText: Here’s your rental agreement and the 24/7 roadside assistance number.
content.speakerTextCn: 这是您的租赁合同和24小时道路救援电话。
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I’ll save it right away.
Great, thanks! Can I take a photo of it too?
Appreciate it—I’ll make sure this is saved in my contacts and set as a speed dial.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表示会保存号码
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'save', 'number', 'roadside assistance' 等关键词

content.speakerText: If you have any issues, just call this number—no need to come back to the counter.
content.speakerTextCn: 如果出问题，直接打这个电话，不用回柜台。
expectedAnswers: Perfect! I’ll keep it in my wallet just in case.
Thanks! What if I’m abroad? Is it still free to call?
Got it—so I can call anytime, even at 3 a.m.?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否确认远程支援的可用性
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 'call', 'anytime', 'abroad' 等表达
表达自然度：是否使用了自然的口语语气（如 'just in case', 'even at 3 a.m.'）
关键词覆盖：是否提及 'call', 'number', 'no need to return' 等核心表达
